rulings.Case Title: KENNETH NORRIS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT THORPE INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar at the request of the moving party. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH NORRIS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant shifted the burden of proof. Plaintiff failed to create a triable issue of fact. The Duncan declaration is struck for failure to comply with the Court's order granting preference. Even if admissable, the Duncan declaration is devoid of any foundational facts for the statement that Mr. Norris was employed by other companies. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH NORRIS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT BAYER CROPSCIENCE, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Failure to shift burden of proof, specifically to negate Mr. Manwill's testimony. Overruled objection to Sage declaration. Grant Motion for Summary Adjudication as to false representation and punitive damages because no opposition by plaintiff. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: ROXANA DUMITRU VS. KEYES EUROPEAN LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANTS KEYES EUROPEAN LLC and CHASE AUTO FINANCE CORPORATION'S Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Arbitration is granted. CLRA claims for damages, as contrasted with injunctive relief, are subject to arbitration. Broughton vs. CIGNA Healthplans (1999) 21 Cal. 4th 1066. =(302/PJM/AY)
